text: Restructured 2026-07-09 per sequencing assessment: (1) reversed parity<->types — the MATLAB/SciPy parity matrix now GATES spectral-types (survey informs type design, not the reverse); (2) added gale-v0-3-5-dense-spectral-kernels (tridiagonal QL + Francis Hessenberg QR, private[gale]) blocking all four implement beads — partial methods need it for projected problems; (3) a/b split encoded via phase-a/phase-b tags + sequencing edges: symmetric eigen + SVD ship first (phase-a), nonsymmetric + generalized eigen + GSVD follow (phase-b). Complex-number decision remains on gale-v0-3-5-spectral-types.
